ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "isonum" INTEGER /* ISO numeric code of the country */,
  "isocode" TEXT /* ISO alpha-3 code of the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Primary region the country belongs to */,
  "region2" TEXT /* Secondary region the country belongs to */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* Country code */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Capital city of the country */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_countries_region2 FOREIGN KEY ("region2") REFERENCES regions ("region2_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_countries_region FOREIGN KEY ("region") REFERENCES regions ("region_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the primary region */,
  "region2_name" TEXT /* Name of the secondary region */,
  "region_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin, analyst) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed for security) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "environmental_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each environmental metric entry */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the environmental metric */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the metric */,
  "rank_envi" INTEGER /* Rank in environmental performance */,
  "envi" REAL /* Overall environmental performance index */,
  "airpollution" REAL /* Air pollution score */,
  "airpollution_dtf" REAL /* Air pollution distance to frontier */,
  "fishstock" REAL /* Fish stock score */,
  "fishstock_dtf" REAL /* Fish stock distance to frontier */,
  "fwateruse" REAL /* Freshwater use score */,
  "fwateruse_dtf" REAL /* Freshwater use distance to frontier */,
  "improved_drinkwater" REAL /* Improved drinking water access score */,
  "improved_drinkwater_dtf" REAL /* Improved drinking water access distance to frontier */,
  "marineprotect" REAL /* Marine protection score */,
  "marineprotect_dtf" REAL /* Marine protection distance to frontier */,
  "pestreg" INTEGER /* Pesticide regulation score */,
  "pestreg_dtf" INTEGER /* Pesticide regulation distance to frontier */,
  "preserve" TEXT /* Preservation status */,
  "preserve_dtf" TEXT /* Preservation status distance to frontier */,
  "terrestprotect" REAL /* Terrestrial protection score */,
  "terrestprotect_dtf" REAL /* Terrestrial protection distance to frontier */,
  "wasterwater" REAL /* Wastewater treatment score */,
  "wasterwater_dtf" REAL /* Wastewater treatment distance to frontier */,
  "metric_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the metric */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  "data_year" INTEGER /* Year the data was collected */,
  "data_value" REAL /* Actual value of the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_environmental_metrics_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the environmental metric being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the metric */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the metric was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the user accessed the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES environmental_metrics ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "policies" (
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each policy */,
  "policy_name" TEXT /* Name of the environmental policy */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "implementation_year" INTEGER /* Year the policy was implemented */,
  "impact_score" REAL /* Impact score of the policy */,
  "impact_description" TEXT /* Description of the policy's impact */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("policy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_policies_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)
